telefonischConsult: Morning callback appointments for a phone consultation with the GP later in the day.
afspraakAfzeggen: We kindly ask you to cancel your appointment by phone at least 24 hours in advance. For appointments with the mental health practice nurse: at least 48 hours in advance.

kwaliteit.title: NPA accreditation since 2006
kwaliteit.text: The practice has held the NPA quality accreditation since 2006, most recently renewed for three years in early 2025. Patient satisfaction scores are consistently 8.5 to 9 out of 10 for doctors, staff, service and organisation.

kwaliteit.title: 10 doctors, 1 team
kwaliteit.text: The four GPs (Louwet, Duijn, Steketee, Van der Eem) form a partnership with 4 employed GPs and 2 GP trainees, totalling 10 doctors. The practice is an accredited training practice for UMC Amsterdam GP trainees and medical students.

The practice emphasises service orientation, collaboration and providing high-quality patient care. Patients are registered with one of the four practice owners and work with a dedicated team of GP, assistant and practice nurse. The practice coordinates care with specialists, hospitals, pharmacists, physiotherapists, psychologists and district nurses. Evening, weekend and night shifts are handled by the Emergency GP Post.

kwaliteit.title: Personal care
kwaliteit.text: Personal, small-scale care matters to us. Often we are part of a large chapter of your life -- joys and sorrows, sometimes from up close. Your team is your first point of contact for questions and concerns about your health, and we guide you -- from young to old -- through acute and chronic illness. We tailor our care to your own needs and possibilities. We also make sure that care from others is coordinated as much as possible, so that you do not get lost in the system.

wistUDat: You do not need to check in at the reception desk for scheduled appointments; please wait in the waiting room of your GP or practitioner
Patient portal available for ordering prescriptions, e-consultations and booking appointments
Appointments only by phone or via the patient portal to protect your privacy
Assistants are trained in triage to provide appropriate care at the right time
A national shortage of medical assistants may cause longer telephone waiting times; the team appreciates your patience
A standard consultation is 15 minutes for one complaint; request a double consultation for multiple complaints or mental health issues
If you suspect a urinary tract infection: leave a urine sample in the cooler at the entrance with a completed form
Reliable health information at thuisarts.nl; use moetiknaardedokter.nl to assess whether a GP visit is necessary
